text:
ByJohn Lonsdale

If you purchase an independently reviewed product or service through a link on our website, Rolling Stone may receive an affiliate commission.

The dash for gold is starting to heat up. The top athletes in the world have already made the2024 Paris Olympicsone to remember, from unforgettable moments fromgymnasticstoswimming. The track and field competition is now underway in the City of Light, as Noah Lyles and Sha’Carri Richardson secured medals earlier this week. But there are still more highly anticipated events scheduled through the rest of the week — here’s how to watch them all online.



From the shot put to the 100-meter dash, the track and field events are in full swing, with Team USA athletes, including the fastest woman in the world and silver medalistSha’Carri Richardson, two-time gold medalist Sydney McLaughlin-Levrone, gold medalist Noah Lyles, gold medalist Sydney Moon, and more Olympians vying for spot at the top of the podium in this month’s games. Here’s how to watch the upcoming track and fieldParis Olympicsevents online at home without cable.

Lyles, who won a gold medal in the 100m event, will compete in the men’s 200m semifinals today, Aug. 7, at 2:10 p.m. ET / 11:10 a.m. PT.

Read on for our full streaming guide to watch Paris Olympics track and field this week.

Carrying local channels like NBC and national networks like USA,DirecTV Streammakes watching many of the Paris Olympics events easy. The live TV streamer offers a five-day free trial upfront to tune into upcoming track and field athletics, then costs $79.99 a month to keep your subscription.



DirecTV Stream is one of the most comprehensive live TV streaming services with up to 160+ channels, including local channels, regional sports networks, and all popular national channels. Packages start at $79.99 a month and all subscriptions start with a five-day free trial.

If you’re not sure which streaming service will air a specific track and field event, you can’t go wrong tuning in with aPeacocksubscription. The streaming service broadcasts all Paris Olympic events, as well as replays and more. You can get a plan starting at $7.99 a month, making it one of the cheapest monthly options out there for streaming the Olympic games.



Peacock includes 50+ channels in its base subscription, starting at $7.99 a month. Peacock will stream all Summer Olympic events, plus event replays and more.Bonus: You can save an extra 17% over the year with a Peacock annual subscription, which costs $79.99.

Trying to watch the Olympics in another country? We suggest springing for a virtual private network, orVPN. In other words, you can watch upcoming track and field Olympic events with a VPN on channels that you wouldn’t normally get where you live. It’s that simple.



ExpressVPN offers internet access in up to 160 locations around the world, making it easy to tune into local networks to watch live sports coverage online. Plans start at $12.95 a month (but right now you can get three months free when signing up for an annual package). Plus: All your info will be kept secure and private.

fuboTVoffers local and national networks alike, including NBC, USA, and the E! Network, all of which will air track and field events over the next few weeks. Fubo is one of the few streamers that comes with a seven-day free trial. Afterwards, subscribers pay a $79.99 monthly subscription fee.



fuboTV offers up 275+ channels, with a ton of sports and local stations included in its plans. Packages start at $79.99 per month, with a seven-day free trial to start.

Hulu + Live TValso offers a variety of channels, including NBC, USA, and E!, in its ad-supported package. A plan will run you $76.99 a month, but you can tune into track and field events and more starting with a three-day free trial.



Hulu + Live TV bundles together all of Hulu’s own content, along with over 95 live TV channels that make it a cinch to watch most games online. Subscriptions also include ESPN+ and Disney+ at no additional cost. Hulu + Live TV costs $76.99 a month after a three-day free trial.

Fans can check the official2024 Olympics schedulefor a complete list of upcoming track and field events, including when to watch Richardson, Lyles, and more over the next few weeks.

We want to hear it. Send us a tip using our anonymous form.

title: How To Watch 2024 Olympics Track and Field Events Online Live Stream
author: John Lonsdale
description: Here's how to stream the Paris Olympics track and field events online with free trials, featuring Sha'Carri Richardson, Noah Lyles, and Sydney Moon.
